base_commit: e265259 (Gate-1 Phase B interface + oracle freeze)
summary: Faithful-subset full mp_gt_driver column path (source/sink + sedimentation + precip + all number concentrations) wired through the coupler; real-WRF oracle parity harness built against the frozen schema and ready to run; oracle savepoints not yet emitted by the factory.

kernel.source_sink_subset: preserved unchanged (step_thompson_column) so M5 analytic fixtures stay valid
kernel.full_path: step_thompson_column_with_precip adds faithful sedimentation (rain/ice/snow/graupel mass+number) and returns surface precip (mm) per channel
kernel.sedimentation: WRF upwind-flux divergence (module_mp_thompson.F:3784-3939), 64 fixed sub-steps, empty-layer fall-speed inheritance (_fill_down), exact mass conservation to surface (residual 3.9e-16)
kernel.fall_speeds: rain/ice from WRF cre/crg/cie/cig formulas (verified); snow single-mode av_s closure; graupel av_g/bv_g(idx_bg1)

adapter.precip_accumulators: per-step += (Gate-1 decision #3): rain_acc<-pptrain, snow_acc<-pptsnow, graupel_acc<-pptgraul, ice_acc<-pptice

harness.real_oracle: tier1_thompson.run_oracle_parity / compare_against_oracle — loads mp_gt_driver_pre->post Phase-B savepoints, runs the full kernel, applies frozen transcription tolerance ladder per field, applies inactive-physical moist mask, checks water closure

oracle_harness_mechanics.json.note: validates harness reshape/mask/tolerance/closure wiring (NOT physics; post=kernel-own-output by construction)

proofs.coefficient_audit.md: WRF file:line audit; prior 2 flagged bugs re-verified already-correct; new sedimentation coefficients verified numerically

honest_scope_limits.cross_species_collection_NOT_ported: rain<->snow and rain<->graupel collection (qr_acr_qs/qr_acr_qg, 15 lookup tables tmr/tcr/tcs/tms/tnr_racs/sacr/racg/gacr) are absent from the extracted thompson-tables-v1.npz asset; faithful porting requires extending scripts/extract_thompson_tables.py to dump them from a WRF (nvfortran) build. FLAGGED, not fabricated.
honest_scope_limits.snow_fallspeed_single_mode: uses av_s*Ds^bv_s on the Field-moment mean diameter, not the full two-gamma vts integral (faithful mp=8 approx when racs riming-boost inactive)
honest_scope_limits.oracle_not_yet_available: real per-process parity vs WRF cannot be measured until the factory emits savepoints; harness is ready and will be run on arrival

preexisting_unrelated_failures: tests requiring a GPU (State.zeros), the missing Fortran-harness binary, and dynamics/mu_t_advance NoneType — all reproduce on the clean base commit e265259 and are outside B1 scope (dynamics/** is closed dycore, not edited)

fp32_precision_guard: sedimentation accumulates in jnp.result_type (fp64) regardless of input field dtype; outputs cast back to the field dtype; verified the fp32 dummy-coupled adapter contract test passes
